summary: P06 added disk-backed artifact layout, event replay, run status, and command log infrastructure for auditable report reconstruction.
expected_outputs: ArtifactLayout based on run_id and root directory
EventRecorder writing JSONL, one valid JSON object per line
Readers tolerate corrupted JSONL lines by marking them invalid instead of crashing report
Event taxonomy includes run, command, node, cluster, fault, failover, metric, assertion events

verified_outputs.output: ArtifactLayout based on run_id and root directory
EventRecorder writing JSONL, one valid JSON object per line

verified_outputs.evidence: status and command log round-trip unit test

verified_outputs.output: Readers tolerate corrupted JSONL lines by marking them invalid instead of crashing report
Event taxonomy includes run, command, node, cluster, fault, failover, metric, assertion events

commands.command: python3 -m py_compile harness/artifacts.py harness/events.py harness/status.py harness/command_log.py

risks: No scenario runtime or final report generation is performed in P06.
Callers must manage unique run_id values.
